expectations.evidence: Issue #1 Privileged Container Execution (CRITICAL) - securityContext.privileged: true identified
Issue #2 Running as Root User (CRITICAL) - securityContext.runAsUser: 0 identified
Issue #5 Host PID Namespace Access (CRITICAL) - spec.template.spec.hostPID: true identified
Issue #7 Docker Socket Mount (CRITICAL) - /var/run/docker.sock mount identified as container escape vector
Issue #8 Overly Permissive ClusterRole (CRITICAL) - wildcard * permissions in apiGroups, resources, verbs identified
Issue #9 Unrestricted ServiceAccount Binding (CRITICAL) - default ServiceAccount bound to cluster-admin ClusterRole identified

expectations.text: Identifies inline secrets in env vars (KA-C018)
expectations.evidence: Issue #3 Exposed Secrets in Environment Variables (CRITICAL) - DB_PASSWORD and API_KEY hardcoded in env vars identified

expectations.text: Provides a numeric score (0-100) with letter grade
expectations.evidence: No numeric score or letter grade provided. Output uses CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity labels only

expectations.text: Uses rule IDs (e.g. KA-C001, KA-A001) to reference violations
expectations.evidence: No rule IDs (KA-C001, KA-A001 style) used anywhere. Issues are numbered 1-13 with plain text descriptions
No PSS (Pod Security Standards) compliance summary section. References Pod Security Policy/Standards in passing but no structured compliance summary

expectations.text: Includes category breakdown table with weighted scores
expectations.evidence: No category breakdown table with weighted scores. Only a severity breakdown table (CRITICAL/MEDIUM/LOW counts) is provided
